title: Fabric Physics Playground: Pouf & Morph Cube Interaction
description: The user controls an AnimatedMorphCube hovering above a SpecularSilkPouf, using it as a stylization tool. By cycling through morph targets, adjusting the cube's height, rotation speed, and emission color, the cube projects dynamic colored light onto the silk pouf below, altering its specular reflections in real time. The goal is to match a target lighting configuration shown as a reference thumbnail.
prompt:
Create a single HTML file using Three.js r170 (via importmap from cdn.jsdelivr.net) that loads two GLB assets: shared_assets/SpecularSilkPouf.glb placed at the scene origin on a ground plane, and shared_assets/AnimatedMorphCube.glb floating 2 units above it. Set up a PerspectiveCamera at position (0, 3, 6) looking at the origin with OrbitControls for free navigation. Add a subtle ambient light (intensity 0.3) and a hemisphere light (sky: 0x8888ff, ground: 0x443322, intensity 0.5). The AnimatedMorphCube should have its morph target animations accessible via THREE.AnimationMixer. Create an HTML overlay panel with these interactive controls: (1) a dropdown to select morph target influence index (0-3) and a slider 0.0-1.0 for its weight, (2) a vertical slider controlling the cube's Y-position from 0.5 to 4.0 units above the pouf, (3) a rotation speed slider (0 to 5 rad/s) spinning the cube around its Y-axis, (4) a color picker that sets a PointLight attached as a child of the cube (intensity 3, distance 6), (5) a roughness override slider (0.0-1.0) that traverses all mesh materials of the SpecularSilkPouf and sets their roughness, and (6) a 'Capture Snapshot' button that logs the current parameter state (morph index, morph weight, cube height, rotation speed, light hex color, roughness) to a visible JSON output div below the canvas. Validate all parameters on capture: morph weight and roughness must be between 0 and 1, cube height between 0.5 and 4.0, rotation speed between 0 and 5. Display validation errors in red text. Add a subtle ground plane (CircleGeometry, radius 4) with MeshStandardMaterial (color 0x222222, roughness 0.9) receiving shadows. Enable renderer shadow maps and make the point light cast shadows onto the pouf and ground. The render loop should update the mixer delta, apply cube rotation, and render each frame.

[State Exposure (required)]
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ updated every animation frame:
window.__3D_STATE__ = {
  cubeYPosition: number,         // vertical position of the AnimatedMorphCube above the pouf in units (0.5-4.0)
  cubeRotationSpeed: number,         // rotation speed of the cube around Y-axis in radians per second (0-5)
  activeMorphIndex: number,         // currently selected morph target index (0-3)
  morphTargetWeight: number,         // influence weight of the active morph target (0.0-1.0)
  pointLightColor: string,         // hex color string of the PointLight attached to the cube
  pointLightIntensity: number,         // intensity value of the PointLight (typically 3.0)
  poufRoughnessOverride: number,         // roughness value applied to all SpecularSilkPouf materials (0.0-1.0)
  cubeCurrentRotationY: number,         // current Y-axis rotation angle of the cube in radians
  isMorphAnimationActive: boolean,         // whether morph target animation is currently playing
  snapshotCount: number,         // total number of snapshots captured by the user
}
